old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-rg8t","title":"[security] Weak/Forgeable CRC32 MIC fallback in link layer (P0)","description":"lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c:verify_mic() and lichen_l2.c accept CRC32 \"MIC\" when !has_link_key or CONFIG_LICHEN_LINK_INSECURE_CRC32_MIC=y. CRC32 is trivial to forge (no auth). Enables frame injection, spoofing, bypass of Schnorr-48. Dev configs and no-key paths deploy this in prod. See Kconfig warnings, replay.c comments, spec/06-security.md. Matches \"weak MIC (e.g. CRC32 in prod)\". Impact: full link-layer compromise. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-lw4f","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"agent@lichen-project.dev","created_at":"2026-07-23T00:00:42.420887735Z","created_by":"AI Agent","updated_at":"2026-07-23T00:00:42.420887735Z"}
